instruction: What is LoRA in machine learning?
output: LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) fine-tunes a small adapter layer instead of all model weights.
RAG retrieves relevant documents at question time and feeds them to the model for grounded answers.

instruction: When should you use RAG instead of fine-tuning?
output: Use RAG when you need up-to-date facts from documents without retraining model weights.
